name: Mini Notes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## Bug Fix: Pinned notes column layout - Fixed pinned notes being capped at fewer columns than the main notes grid, even on wide windows. Pinned notes now use the same responsive column layout as the rest of your notes, so they take full advantage of available width regardless of how many pinned notes you have or how tall they are.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 🎉 Mini Notes is now officially available on the Obsidian Community Plugins store!
You can install and update it directly from Settings → Community plugins in Obsidian.

Check it out on the [Obsidian plugin directory](https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/mini-notes).

releases.author: rknastenka
releases.description: ## Fifth Official Release: New features & Bug Fixes! 🎆🎊 - fixes #24 - fixes #23 - fix bug: slow pin, unpin movement - new feat: left click on note to preview - new feat: option to display the YAML in the note preview

releases.author: rknastenka
releases.description: ## **Fourth Official Release: New features!** 🎆🎊 - Delete notes directly from the cards view using your mouse middle-click. - Quickly undo deletions with Ctrl + Z. - Improved drag-and-drop for smoother card movement. - Fixed cards' max width on small screens ## Installation 1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` 2. Create a folder called mini-notes in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory 3. Place the downloaded files in this folder 4. Reload Obsidian 5. Enable "Mini Notes" in Settings → Community Plugins

releases.author: rknastenka
releases.description:
## Third Official Release: Bug Fixes

- smooth drag and drop of cards
- increase the search bar max width
- fix Mini Notes folder auto creation 
- Mismatched colors in search bar filter
- fix suggestions like "folder:"
- close any opened color-picker when opening a new one

releases.author: rknastenka
releases.description:
## Second Official Release: Bug Fixes & New improvements!

### Bug Fixes: 
- Preview Tables & Code Blocks!
- Ignore code blocks when extracting tags
- the note title wrapping issue
- Decrease list indentation within the card preview
- pdf preview in the cards view

### New Features:
- Search bar & filter functionalities within it 
- Smart search text highlighting for normal text searches
- Filter by `folder, tag, color, pinned, type.` 
- Change the source folder within the main cards' view
- Add a "Create New Note" button to the main cards view

releases.author: rknastenka
releases.description:
# First Official Release!

**Mini Notes** is an Obsidian plugin that helps you quickly jot down notes during focus sessions and review them later in a beautiful masonry view.

## Features

- **Quick Note Creation**: Press `Ctrl + [` to instantly create a mini note
- **Colorful Masonry View**: Google Keep-style layout with customizable note colors
- **Pin Important Notes**: Keep your most important notes at the top
- **Filter by Tags**: Organize and filter notes by tags
- **Support**: Full desktop & mobile support
- **Theme**: Beautiful in both light and dark themes

## Configurable Settings 

- Customizable hotkeys
- Configurable source folder
- Theme color preferences
- Maximum notes limit setting


## Installation

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`
2. Create a folder called `mini-notes` in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory
3. Place the downloaded files in this folder
4. Reload Obsidian
5. Enable "Mini Notes" in Settings → Community Plugins
